full_text:
Did you know you can create your own AI telephony agent? . That's right! VideoSDK lets you do this using their cutting-edge Agent SDK. . Imagine handling calls effortlessly! .

First, you need a SIP provider, like Twilio. . This routes your calls directly to VideoSDK’s infrastructure! . The magic happens when a Routing Rule dispatches calls to your self-hosted AI agent. .

Getting started is a breeze! You’ll need Python 3.12+ for your AI agent. . Create your project structure with a main.py file. . Don’t forget the .env file for secret credentials! .

Here’s the kicker! Your AI agent processes audio in real-time. . This means instant responses for any caller! . Once set up, you can chat from any phone! .

So, are you ready to build your AI assistant? . Sign up for a free VideoSDK account for your VIDEOSDK_TOKEN. . The future of telephony is here! .
